summary: Updated 3 governance scripts and created 1 new import validator for 92-skill scale. check-skill-overlap-governance.mjs: added circular dependency detection and transitive conflict detection. normalize-superpowers-skills.mjs: extended skill discovery to all opencode-config/skills/*/SKILL.md (not just superpowers/), validates frontmatter has required name+description fields. validate-skill-import.mjs (NEW): checks registry-to-SKILL.md consistency, orphan detection, bidirectional synergy refs, acyclic dependency refs. 16 TDD tests added, all governance scripts exit 0.
